Name: Blixt
Description:
Blixt’s mission is to enable full software control of electricity, using solid state technology.

The world has changed dramatically over the past century and most sectors have undertaken the digital transformation, but our electricity system has been left behind. When it comes to electricity control we still use mechanical circuit breakers, a 100 year old technology. With rising electricity consumption, increased electrification, peak loads and unpredictable renewable energy we need new tools to plan and manage electricity. Our current infrastructure is simply not designed to handle the new ...

Name: Opper AI
Description: Opper AI replaces fragile prompt chains with a task‑completion API. Describe tasks once in JSON - inputs, expected output, and a success test - and call a single endpoint. Opper builds prompts, routes them across 80+ proprietary and open‑source LLMs, and auto‑retries or falls back until the response passes your test. It returns structured output, a pass/fail flag, and stores each success as an example for future runs.
